source: Live sim refresh (Regime B + intra-row pipelining, Layout A) on 2026-04-24
note: Regenerate via gen_expected_cycles.py after any sim-model change. AH configs (attn_head) are manually maintained — refresh after running test.py --model attention.

azurelily_dimm_top_d64_c128.todo: Stage names map to Azure-Lily modules: score=mac_qk, softmax=clb_softmax (S_LOAD+S_INV+S_NORM), wsum=mac_sv. Residuals annotated in phase5_known_deltas.json.

nldpe_attn_head_d64_c128.note: Captured from azurelily/IMC/test.py --model attention --seq_length 128 --head_dim 64 --imc_file configs/nl_dpe.json post-2026-04-24 sim parallelism fix (gemm_log intra-row pipelining: feed of next pass overlaps current pass's compute+drain via intra_row_steady=max(feed,compute_chain,drain)). Pre-fix mac_qk=5690, mac_sv=5339, e2e=14480; post-fix smaller because the new sim correctly models the RTL DPE lane's intra-row pipelining behavior. linear_qkv = max(linear_Q, linear_K, linear_V) = 23553.33 ns (parallel arms). Cycles = round(ns / t_clk) with t_clk = 9.7182 ns (Fmax=102.9 MHz).

azurelily_attn_head_d64_c128.note: Captured from azurelily/IMC/test.py --model attention --seq_length 128 --head_dim 64 --imc_file configs/azure_lily.json post-2026-04-24 sim parallelism fix (gemm_dsp n_parallel_outputs=N for DIMM parallel-row + intra-wave pipelining). Pre-fix mac_qk=6661, mac_sv=6091, e2e=17689; post-fix dramatically smaller because gemm_dsp now models the parallel-output DSP fabric (n_parallel_outputs=N=128) correctly rather than serialising along the DSP-pool axis with dsp_batch=8. linear_qkv = max(linear_Q, linear_K, linear_V) = 45506.56 ns (parallel arms). Cycles = round(ns / t_clk) with t_clk = 11.3766 ns (Fmax=87.9 MHz).
